zh-hans.Rougham,Mitford,Norfolk,England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Mollenes于1147年之前与Richard Mollenes在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Mollenes married Richard Mollenes before 1147, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Mollenes a épousé Richard Mollenes avant 1147, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Mollenes hat vor 1147 in England Richard Mollenes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Mollenes lei sposato Richard Mollenes prima del 1147, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Rougham,Mitford,Norfolk,England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアム
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Mollenesは1147年以前にイギリスでRichard Mollenesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Mollenes(은)는 1147년 이전 영국에서 Richard Mollenes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Mollenes casou-se com Richard Mollenes antes 1147, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Mollenes вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Mollenes перед 1147 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Mollenes se casó con Richard Mollenes antes de 1147, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
